name: Triangulated Synthesis
summary: Three-role epistemic check on load-bearing claims: L1 answers in trusting mode, L2 answers in critical mode, L3 acts as a Solomon judge that reconciles. Distinct from debate (two-sided) and self-consistency (vote across samples) — three roles with an explicit judge and a permanent markdown artefact written into memory.

raised_by.note: Sparrot invokes triangulation only on questions she judges epistemically load-bearing (~30–40s, high-cost). The runner executes L1 trusting → L2 critical → L3 Solomon judge in series and writes a permanent .md report into memory.

rejected_reason: Subsumed as a 3-role variant of inner-committee (single agent, several voices, one output) and debate (multi-position structured exchange). L1-trusting / L2-critical / L3-Solomon-judge is a specific protocol within that family rather than a distinct intent; the permanent-artefact requirement belongs to decision-log / provenance-ledger composition. Promoting would split a single intent across two entries (GoF: intent is what distinguishes patterns of identical structure).
